compressed_context:
ARTICLE: DIRECTIVE-2003/87/EC [COUNCIL+PARLIAMENT:2003-10-13] ESTABLISH ETS  
SCHEME: GHG EMISSIONS ∧ EMISSION-ALLOWANCES TRADABLE ACROSS MEMBER-STATES  
PHASES: I(2005–2007) ∧ II(2008–2012: KYOTO-COMPLIANCE) ∧ III(2013–2020)  
CLAIM: EU-ETS = PILOT MARKET-BASED REGULATION EXPERIMENT  
PHASE-II TOTAL-ALLOWANCES=6.031×10^9 UNITS ALLOCATED BY MEMBER-STATES (2017)  
PHASE-III ALLOCATION=AUCTIONING↑ ∧ FREE-ALLOCATION↓ PER SECTOR  
PROPOSAL: PHASE-IV (2021–2030) LRF=2.2% Y/Y FROM 2013  
CTX: MARKET-BASED REGULATION PRECEDENTS  
  US-ACID-RAIN-PROGRAM → INFORMS EU-ETS DESIGN  
CTX: KYOTO-PROTOCOL  
  CDM/JI CREDITS → EU-ETS-UNITS (COST-EFFECTIVE ABATEMENT)  
MARKET DYNAMICS: LOW-COST SECTORS SELL ∧ HIGH-COST BUY  
PRICE-SIGNAL→INVESTMENT IN LOW-CARBON INFRASTRUCTURE  
CHALLENGE: MARKET-BASED REGULATION → COMPLEX HYBRID SYSTEM  
LESSON: NEED RELIABLE MONITORING ∧ COMPATIBLE TRADING RULES
